_meta.keyKnowledge: We develop our listening, singing and instrumental skills using the elements of music.

_source.w: We develop our listening, singing and instrumental skills using the elements of music.
y: Strong musical skills help us express ourselves more fully and confidently.
Good listening is the foundation of all music-making and collaboration.
Developing technique means we can play and sing the music we imagine.
eg: We practise singing in tune by matching a note we hear with our voice.
We play call-and-response singing games to develop our listening and responding skills.
We explore elements of music — rhythm, melody, dynamics, tempo — through practical activities.
We practise playing classroom instruments with correct technique.
We learn to keep a steady beat while others play different rhythms around us.
We develop our ability to sing in rounds, holding our own part while hearing another.
